languages.original_text: "A thesis that neither Nuncius nor I will dispute. This ship is like an abscess teeming with corruption... and it is just about to burst."

languages.text: "Тезис, который ни я, ни Нунциус не станем оспаривать. Сие судно подобно абсцессу, кишащему скверной... И он вот-вот лопнет".
"A thesis that neither Nuncius nor I will dispute. This ship is like an abscess teeming with corruption... and it is just about to burst."
languages.original_text: "Тезис, который ни я, ни Нунциус не станем оспаривать. Сие судно подобно абсцессу, кишащему скверной... И он вот-вот лопнет".

traits.locale_text: "A thesis that neither Nuncius nor I will dispute. This ship is like an abscess teeming with corruption... and it is just about to burst."
"A thesis that neither Nuncius nor I will dispute. This ship is like an abscess teeming with corruption... and it is just about to burst."
"A thesis that neither Nuncius nor I will dispute. This ship is like an abscess teeming with corruption... and it is just about to burst."

languages.text: «Una tesis que ni Nuncius ni yo discutiremos. Esta nave es como un absceso lleno de corrupción... y a punto de explotar».
languages.original_text: "A thesis that neither Nuncius nor I will dispute. This ship is like an abscess teeming with corruption... and it is just about to burst."

traits.locale_text: «Una tesis que ni Nuncius ni yo discutiremos. Esta nave es como un absceso lleno de corrupción... y a punto de explotar».

languages.text: 「ヌンキウスも私も異を唱えぬ論題です。この艦は、腐敗がうごめく膿瘍のようなもの……そして今まさに、破裂しようとしています」
languages.original_text: "A thesis that neither Nuncius nor I will dispute. This ship is like an abscess teeming with corruption... and it is just about to burst."

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンキウスも私も異を唱えぬ論題です。この艦は、腐敗がうごめく膿瘍のようなもの……そして今まさに、破裂しようとしています」

languages.text: “这一论点我和努恩修斯都不会反驳。这艘船就像一个充满腐化的脓疮……随时都可能爆裂开来。”
languages.original_text: "A thesis that neither Nuncius nor I will dispute. This ship is like an abscess teeming with corruption... and it is just about to burst."

traits.locale_text: “这一论点我和努恩修斯都不会反驳。这艘船就像一个充满腐化的脓疮……随时都可能爆裂开来。”

languages.text: "Eine These, der weder ich noch Nuncius widersprechen werden. Das Schiff gleicht einem Abszess voller Verderbnis ... und er kann jeden Moment platzen."
languages.original_text: "A thesis that neither Nuncius nor I will dispute. This ship is like an abscess teeming with corruption... and it is just about to burst."

traits.locale_text: "Eine These, der weder ich noch Nuncius widersprechen werden. Das Schiff gleicht einem Abszess voller Verderbnis ... und er kann jeden Moment platzen."

languages.text: « Nuncius et moi vous concédons l'argument. Le vaisseau est un abcès gonflé de corruption. Et il est sur le point de crever. »
languages.original_text: "A thesis that neither Nuncius nor I will dispute. This ship is like an abscess teeming with corruption... and it is just about to burst."

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius et moi vous concédons l'argument. Le vaisseau est un abcès gonflé de corruption. Et il est sur le point de crever. »

languages.text: "Ne Nuncius ne de benim itiraz edeceğim bir tez. Bu gemi, yozlaşmayla kaynayan bir apse gibi... Ve patlamak üzere."
